emails.subject: Structured Sales to CA
emails.body: Structured Sales to CA Jeff: Attached is some information regarding EPMI sales to CA utilities and munis. We looked at only transactions by the Middle Market Group. It might be possible to bring in trades made through the traders, but that would require a significant time investment and I don't think there would be that many additional deals. It is interesting to note that our average price for the very long term deals is $50. For CA utilities and munis that were bold enough to make decisions, their prices are below $50! Call to discuss. Chris

emails.subject: Re: Structured Sales to CA
emails.body: Re: Structured Sales to CA Chris: Thanks a lot for the info and the help. I'm out next week, but will probably give you a call to discuss a bit. Thanks again; should be very useful. Best, Jeff
